name: golang-github-cloudflare-redoctober-dev
title: golang-github-cloudflare-redoctober-dev
description:
Software-based two-man rule style (development files)
Red October is a software-based two-man rule style encryption and
decryption server.  The two-man rule is a control mechanism designed
to achieve a high level of security by requiring the presence of two
authorized people at all times. In the case of Red October the
two-man rule is implemented by encrypting data in such as way as to
require two authorised key-holds to decrypt it.
.
This package contains the development files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-cloudflare-redoctober-dev because Software-based two-man rule style (development files).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cloudflare-redoctober-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cloudflare-redoctober-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cloudflare-redoctober-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
